title: AST Assault 1: Tok [AK25040304]
summary: On April 28, 2025 at about 1810 hours, Alaska State Troopers received a report of an altercation having just occurred in Tok. Subsequent investigation resulted in Julian Rauch, age 30 of Tok, being arrested for one count of Assault in the First Degree. Rauch was remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center and held without bail pending arraignments.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

charges: one count of Assault in the First Degree
entities.address_detail: having just occurred in Tok

title: Cobell Indian Trust Settlement
summary: Are you an Heir of an Individual Indian Money Account Holder? A $3.4 billion dollar settlement was approved in a class action lawsuit, called Cobell v. Salazar, that claimed individual Indian […] The post Cobell Indian Trust Settlement first appeared on Chugachmiut .
